[ Learn More ](https://dfppartners.com/about/why-dfp-partners/) ![banner image](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/banner-img-quality-mobile-c.webp) What We Do For over 40 years, DFP Partners has been a committed partner in financial accounting and compliance to Broker-Dealers and Registered Investment Advisers. We provide a range of services covering everything from outsourced FinOp and CCO roles to AML testing and cybersecurity compliance consulting. ![Feature 0](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/1.webp) FinOp, PFO & POO Services & Supervision DFP Partners specializes in providing outsourced FinOp, PFO & POO services — freeing you to focus on your business. [ learn more ](https://dfppartners.com/services/outsourced-finop/) ![Feature 1](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/2.webp) Broker-Dealer Membership & Compliance Whether you want to outsource your CCO entirely, or leverage our consulting team on a project or retainer basis to support your in-house CCO, we offer a suite of compliance services that will meet your needs. [ learn more ](https://dfppartners.com/services/broker-dealer-membership-compliance/) ![Feature 2](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/RIA-icon.webp) RIA Registration & Compliance DFP Partners offers wide-ranging compliance solutions for investment advisers including: SEC registration, outsourced CCO, and ongoing compliance support. [ learn more ](https://dfppartners.com/services/ria-registration-compliance/) ![Feature 3](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/anti-laundering-programs.webp) AML Testing DFP Partners provides independent testing of the Anti-Money Laundering (AML) programs of FINRA member broker-dealers and other financial institutions. [ For Broker Dealers ](https://dfppartners.com/services/anti-money-laundering-testing/) [ For Investment Advisers ](https://dfppartners.com/services/investment-adviser-anti-money-laundering-aml-compliance-solutions/) ![Feature 4](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/5.webp) Cybersecurity Cybersecurity is a key focus for regulatory agencies. DFP Partners can ensure your firm is prepared to be evaluated on its cybersecurity risk management and data protection practices. [ learn more ](https://dfppartners.com/services/cybersecurity/) ![Feature 5](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/6.webp) Accounting & Bookkeeping DFP Partners is a CPA firm that has been recognized for its accuracy and professionalism in outsourced Client Accounting Services for over four decades. [ learn more ](https://dfppartners.com/services/accounting-bookkeeping/) ![Testimonial image](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/svgviewer-png-output.webp) What Our Clients Have to Say ![Testimonial Title colon](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/svgviewer-png-outpute.webp) DFP Partners has been a part of our family since 2007. They are very responsive and knowledgeable, allowing our broker-dealer business to operate smoothly and efficiently. We highly recommend DFP to any new broker-dealer firm or any business looking for a hand in accounting or compliance. —— Helen Chin Luk, CGS International Securities USA, Inc. As a small team at Pacenote, we've leveraged DFP Partners' expertise in Accounting, FinOps and Compliance since our firm's inception in 2019. With DFP, we've had efficient & successful audit and regulatory reviews that have benefited from their organization and attention to detail. We enjoy interacting with each of our DFP contact points across services and will continue to recommend them to others! —— Matthew Evans, Pacenote Capital I've never had a better business partner than DFP. They have the most talented, hard working, scrupulous people I've ever worked with. The team is hyper invested in their clients' success and ability to maintain a pristine reputation in the industry. We greatly value the continued partnership. —— Lisandra Wilmott, Savvy Wealth ![Serve Image](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Group-1141.webp) Who We Serve DFP Partners is proud to serve a wide array of financial services companies at all stages of growth. See below for information on the types of firms we work with most often. Broker-Dealers DFP Partners has 40 years of experience solving many of the most common challenges that broker-dealers face. [ learn more ](https://dfppartners.com/who-we-serve/broker-dealers/) RIAs DFP Partners offers wide-ranging compliance solutions to investment advisers including: regulatory services, anti-money laundering programs, and ongoing support and advice. [ learn more ](https://dfppartners.com/who-we-serve/registered-investment-advisers/) Start-ups & New Businesses DFP Partners has created a cost-effective model for startups in the FinTech sector, helping with: tax compliance & advising, business strategy & consulting, and advising on your approach to raising capital. [ learn more ](https://dfppartners.com/who-we-serve/start-ups-new-businesses/) [ ![DFP Partners](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/themes/dfp-partners/assets/img/site-logo.webp) ](https://dfppartners.com) Let's Talk Speak to a DFP Partners consultant. * First & Last Name* * Email* * Phone* * Company* * Tell us more or ask a question* * What services are you interested in?* * Accounting/FinOp * Compliance Consulting/CCO * Broker-Dealer Hosting * AML Compliance & Testing * * * * * * CAPTCHA Quick Links * [About](https://dfppartners.com/about/why-dfp-partners/) * [Broker-Dealers](https://dfppartners.com/who-we-serve/broker-dealers/) * [Investment Advisers](https://dfppartners.com/who-we-serve/registered-investment-advisers/) * [Outsourced FinOp](https://dfppartners.com/services/outsourced-finop/) * [Compliance](https://dfppartners.com/services/broker-dealer-membership-compliance/) * [AML Testing](https://dfppartners.com/services/anti-money-laundering-testing/) * [Cybersecurity](https://dfppartners.com/services/cybersecurity/) * [Resources](https://dfppartners.com/resources/) New York 485 Madison Avenue 15th Floor New York, NY 10022 Additional offices in Boston & Miami [(212) 751-4422](tel:\(212\)%20751-4422) info@dfppartners.com [![linkedin icon](https://dfppartners.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/linkedin.webp)](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dfp-partners/) Copyright © 2026 * [Privacy & Security](https://dfppartners.com/dfp-partners-website-privacy-policy/) * [Terms of Use](https://dfppartners.com/terms-of-use/) * [Cookie Policy](https://dfppartners.com/dfp-partners-cookie-policy/) [get in touch ](https://dfppartners.com/#footer) Notifications
